Package neqsim.process.safety.scenario

Class ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseDispersionScenario

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.scenario.ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseDispersionScenario
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
public static class ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseDispersionScenario extends Object implements Serializable
Result from one automatically generated release-dispersion scenario.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReleaseDispersionScenario

      public ReleaseDispersionScenario(String processName, String scenarioName, String equipmentName, String equipmentType, String streamName, double streamPressureBara, double streamTemperatureK, double streamMassFlowRateKgPerS, double holeDiameterM, double inventoryVolumeM3, double releaseDurationSeconds, double releaseHeightM, ReleaseOrientation releaseOrientation, ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase releaseCase, ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.WeatherCase weatherCase, SourceTermResult sourceTerm, GasDispersionResult dispersionResult, TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult trappedInventoryResult, Map<String,Double> componentMoleFractions, List<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ConsequenceBranch> consequenceBranches)
      Creates a release-dispersion scenario result.
      Parameters:
      processName - process system name
      scenarioName - scenario name
      equipmentName - equipment name
      equipmentType - equipment Java type
      streamName - stream name
      streamPressureBara - stream pressure in bara
      streamTemperatureK - stream temperature in K
      streamMassFlowRateKgPerS - stream mass flow rate in kg/s
      holeDiameterM - leak hole diameter in m
      inventoryVolumeM3 - representative inventory volume in m3
      releaseDurationSeconds - source-term duration in s
      releaseHeightM - release height in m
      releaseOrientation - release orientation
      releaseCase - release taxonomy case
      weatherCase - weather case
      sourceTerm - source-term result
      dispersionResult - dispersion screening result
      trappedInventoryResult - optional trapped inventory result
      componentMoleFractions - stream component mole fractions
      consequenceBranches - consequence branches

      trapped inventory result, or null when representative volume is used

      Gets component mole fractions.

      immutable component mole-fraction map

      Returns:
      immutable branch list

    • hasFlammableCloud

      public boolean hasFlammableCloud()
      Checks whether the scenario has a flammable cloud endpoint.
      Returns:
      true if an LFL endpoint was calculated

    • hasToxicEndpoint

      public boolean hasToxicEndpoint()
      Checks whether the scenario has a toxic endpoint.
      Returns:
      true if a toxic endpoint was calculated

      public CfdSourceTermCase toCfdSourceTermCase()
      Converts this scenario to a CFD source-term handoff case.
      Returns:
      CFD source-term case

      Converts the scenario to a JSON-friendly map.
      Returns:
      ordered map representation

      public String toJson()
      Converts the scenario to compact JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the scenario
